nasb.text: Then his father went down to the woman; and Samson made a feast there, for the young men customarily did this.

esv.text: His father went down to the woman, and Samson prepared a feast there, for so the young men used to do.

cnv.text: 參孫的父親下去見那女子，參孫在那裡擺設了筵席，因為青年人都慣常這樣行。

ccb.text: 参孙的父亲去那女子家，参孙按习俗摆设宴席。
